narrative:
Liberty  Twp township has 2,109 registered voters, with 47.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 42.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.3%, a pronounced Republican lean of 32.0 percentage points.
